review_notes: This entry records a redacted Auth/RBAC smoke summary for the faa7ad6 Foundation Alpha POC runtime, refreshed with verifier source 2e9b363.
The runtime subject remains faa7ad6; the later verifier/source archive contains only runtime-neutral readiness and smoke-tool changes.
The reviewed summary omits credentials, DSNs, object locators, executor internals, runtime workspace paths, and personal workstation paths.

This evidence supports the Foundation Alpha POC security baseline only. It does not close production auth rollout, capacity, sandbox hardening, ordinary-user multi-agent, department rollout, runtime export, or release-evidence retention gates.
